title: ‚Äã‚ÄãUK Freeports Programme Report 2025‚Äã
body: "The UK Freeports Programme Report 2025 provides a comprehensive update on the progress of the 12 Freeports across England, Scotland (where they are known as Green Freeports) and Wales. This includes key milestones and statistics on areas including site development and investment, as well as case studies of individual projects across the Freeports.  "
